item.title: Billionaires Demand More Amenities on Moon After Colonization: 'Where's the Free Shuttle?'
item.description: New residents of Moonburg complain that bioluminescent bathhouses lack sufficient towel service.

item.title: Weightlessness Wonders: Teal-Tower Float Amenities Rated Amidst Stratospheric Lawsuits
item.description: Formerly a leisure activity, now an exclusive ticket to cosmic chaos as gravity takes a genteel dive.

item.title: Mourning the Morning: Sun's Death by Mismanagement Declared Final on 412th Anniversary
item.description: Common Weal Clause Erased, Serfs Left in Eternal Twilight of Economic Misery

item.title: Chancellor Nuage-Montfort Denies 'Re-Shelving' Raids as Monthly Fees Rise to 3.7 Million Drachmae
item.description: Overdue scrolls may trigger the ambiance-altering 'weather-adjustment' chambers, but nobody’s complaining—allegedly.

item.title: Council of Drifting Aeouia Decrees Sleeves of Unfashion as Supreme Attire
item.description: Meanwhile, gasbag collisions surge as citizens embrace the wisdom of extended hems.

item.title: Dustspire Apothecaries Unveil 'Strategic' Theft of Volt-Pouches Amid 'National Emergency' Status
item.description: Local officials proclaim a moral victory while the death toll is reclassified as 'acceptable collateral.'

item.title: TEAL-FACED WORKER REUBEN COBBLER REFUSES SOCRATIC CONSULTING FEES
item.description: INSISTS ON PAYING FULL SHOELACE QUOTAS, UNRAVELS THE COLLECTIVE DREAM OF MONETIZED INQUIRY.

item.title: Valet Enforcers Deploy After Towel Crisis: Laundry Operations Now at State of Emergency
item.description: Bureaucratic 'Courtesy Strikes' Following Interrupted Linen Conveyor Operations

item.title: Neural Tribunal Adopts Loyalty Tags, Ensuring Ad-Surcharge Officials Feel Right at Home in Their Guilt
item.description: Citizens Now Advised to Flush Skin Bronze and Recite Surcharge Ledgers with Gusto; Just Another Day in Luxury.

item.title: Instituto Peso Albañil García Float Away in Lawsuit Sea
item.description: As the weight of bureaucracy dissipates, mourning rituals commence for the void now left by the gravity regulators.
